title: campanula trachelium subsp. athoa
intro: Campanula trachelium subsp. athoa, also known as the bluebell leaved bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant belonging to the Campanula genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campanula trachelium subsp. athoa include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or made into tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
